title: Region should be set explicitly when creating a new AwsClient
description: When creating a new AwsClient, the region should be set explicitly to avoid unexpected behavior or errors. Not specifying the region can lead to the client defaulting to an unintended region, which may cause failures or data to be processed in the wrong location.
recommendation: Always specify the region explicitly when constructing an AwsClient instance.
impact: Failing to set the region explicitly can result in service calls being routed to the wrong AWS region, leading to increased latency, unexpected costs, or data residency issues.

examples.bad: AwsClient client = AwsClient.builder().build(); // No region specified

checks.message: Always specify the region explicitly when constructing an AwsClient instance.
